full_text:
Zhang Ji (Yuanjiang) 張濟 (元江)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ji (張濟), styledYuanjiang (元江). Educated in literature. Died of illness and commended for merits by Emperor Ling. Zhang Ji was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhang Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
